ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loggers" (
  "logger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the logger */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logging level of the logger */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the logger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the logger was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the logger was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loggers_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES log_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log level */,
  "levelname" TEXT /* Name of the log level (e.g., INFO, DEBUG, ERROR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "logger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logger that generated the entry */,
  "asctime" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was logged */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log level of the entry */,
  "msg" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "relativeCreated" REAL /* Relative creation time of the entry */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread that generated the entry */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Name of the thread that generated the entry */,
  "func_name" TEXT /* Name of the function that generated the entry */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file where the entry was logged */,
  "exception" TEXT /* Exception information (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES log_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_logger_id FOREIGN KEY ("logger_id") REFERENCES loggers ("logger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Name of the thread */,
  "daemon" INTEGER /* Whether the thread is a daemon thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module where the function is defined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "logger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logger to which the filter applies */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log level to which the filter applies */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread to which the filter applies */,
  "asctime_start" TEXT /* Start timestamp for the filter */,
  "asctime_end" TEXT /* End timestamp for the filter */,
  "comparison_operator" TEXT /* Comparison operator for the filter (e.g., =, !=, <, >, <=, >=) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_filters_thread_id FOREIGN KEY ("thread_id") REFERENCES threads ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_filters_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES log_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_filters_logger_id FOREIGN KEY ("logger_id") REFERENCES loggers ("logger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter used to generate the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_reports_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES log_filters ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "logger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the logger that triggered the alert */,
  "asctime" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log level of the alert */,
  "msg" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, sms, notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_logger_id FOREIGN KEY ("logger_id") REFERENCES loggers ("logger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_entry_tags" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id", "tag")
)
